title: Uka-Uka the Movie: Nini Tulang
overview: Shelly accompanied by Rama, Karin, Doni, and Eja were in Alas Moyang forest to participate in a courage test event. As soon as the event began, Shelly shouted to say "tulang" ("bones") that were taboo in the forest. Soon, Shelly disappears, terror and search begin.
